interpretation.asset_criticality: Most important — business context dominates. CVSS alone is a poor predictor. 62.5% of model decision weight.
interpretation.epss_score: Second — EPSS probability of exploitation is the strongest empirical predictor. 25.3% weight.
interpretation.network_exposure: Third — internet-facing assets get priority over internal. 6.4% weight.
interpretation.in_kev: KEV membership provides strong binary signal for active exploitation. 2.3% weight.
interpretation.cvss_score: Low importance — CVSS score only explains 1.1% of risk variance when other features are present. Confirms that CVSS alone is insufficient for prioritization.

note: Trained on 65 golden regression cases. asset_criticality dominance increased from 57.2% to 62.5% with expanded dataset. EPSS increased from 18.7% to 25.3%.
